'''badhufu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:oodle|oodle]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-dh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:oodle|oodle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| badhufu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:bædhifith|bædhifith]] || [[word:bædhifij|bædhifij]] || [[word:bædhifish|bædhifish]] || [[word:bædhifi|bædhifi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:badhudhufuth|badhudhufuth]] || [[word:badhudhufuj|badhudhufuj]] || [[word:badhudhufush|badhudhufush]] || [[word:badhudhufu|badhudhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:badhufuth|badhufuth]] || [[word:badhufuj|badhufuj]] || [[word:badhufush|badhufush]] || [[word:badhufu|badhufu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:badhuffuth|badhuffuth]] || [[word:badhuffuj|badhuffuj]] || [[word:badhuffush|badhuffush]] || [[word:badhuffuf|badhuffuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:badhufuthu|badhufuthu]] || [[word:badhufuju|badhufuju]] || [[word:badhufushu|badhufushu]] || [[word:badhufuku|badhufuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:badhufuth|badhufuth]] || [[word:badhufuj|badhufuj]] || [[word:badhufush|badhufush]] || [[word:badhufu|badhufu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:badhufuthul|badhufuthul]] || [[word:badhufujul|badhufujul]] || [[word:badhufushul|badhufushul]] || [[word:badhufukul|badhufukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:badhufuthuthu|badhufuthuthu]] || [[word:badhufujuju|badhufujuju]] || [[word:badhufushushu|badhufushushu]] || [[word:badhufuku|badhufuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:badhufuthun|badhufuthun]] || [[word:badhufujun|badhufujun]] || [[word:badhufushun|badhufushun]] || [[word:badhufukun|badhufukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:badhufuthuoro|badhufuthuoro]] || [[word:badhufujuoro|badhufujuoro]] || [[word:badhufushuoro|badhufushuoro]] || [[word:badhufukuoro|badhufukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|88d00a5}}
